rows.label: qev051403_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you the BLADEs entrusted by Lord Zo Zinath
to fight alongside us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am Gi Nogan.
I have been assigned to defend this area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0003
rows.name:
The enemy has split into several groups
and is attempting to push into the interior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0004
rows.name:
To invade our position, the enemy must break through
the narrow passage up ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0005
rows.name:
In other words, if we can hold them off at this passage,
we can successfully defend this entire area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0006
rows.name: Please stop the enemy's advance at the passage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him your preparations are complete.

rows.label: qev051403_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him you need to prepare.

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0007
rows.name:
There are a significant number of enemies, but if we utilize
the geographical advantage of the narrow passage,
even our small numbers should be able to handle them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0008
rows.name:
I must group up with Lord Zo Zinath!
May fortune favor you in battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0011
rows.name:
It appears the enemy is concentrating their forces here!
We are struggling! Requesting reinforcements![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0012
rows.name:
We are holding the main force off here,
but several units slipped past us!
I need you all to annihilate them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0013
rows.name: Fall back from your current position and head this way immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0014
rows.name:
Every second counts!
If we do nothing, they will slowly but surely break through![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051403_MSG0015
rows.name:
Move immediately!
I repeat!
Move immediately![ST:wait ]
